title: hartliella capitata
intro: Hartliella capitata, also known as Heartleaf or False Heartleaf, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Hartliella capitata include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Hartliella capitata is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and it can also be used as a poultice or applied topically to affected areas for localized treatment.
